chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. D – 534 of 2016 (Ali Asghar & another V/s Province of Sindh & others) Hearing of Case For hearing of Main Case. Before: Mr. Justice Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Date of Hearing & Order: 28-04-2022 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr. Sanwan Khan Jagirani, Legal Advisor for Respondents-SIDA. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. O R D E R Muhammad Junaid Ghaffar, J. – While confronted with the Order passed on 22.03.2022, Counsel for the Petitioners does not press this Petition and submits that as per observations of the Hon’ble Supreme Court in case of Sindh Irrigation Department Authority v. Government of Sindh and others (Civil Appeal No.10-K to 17-K of 2019) dated 24.03.2021, the Petitioners would seek appropriate remedy under the Sindh Water Management Ordinance, 2002. Order accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
